scenes.description: Intense action violence throughout, featuring frequent gunfights and sword combat with many bloody deaths including slashing, impalement, and gunshot injuries. Includes brief dismemberment imagery and disturbing body disposal scenes.

Strong language throughout, including over 100 uses of the F-word and variations, frequent coarse profanity, and extensive insulting and sexualized language. The dialogue also includes repeated scatological and mild obscenities.

792307.Title: Poor Things
792307.Summary: Aged 18+ for brutal graphic violence, explicit sex and heavy nudity, and strong language throughout.

scenes.description: Strong disturbing content throughout, featuring graphic surgical and body-horror imagery, corpse mutilation, animal deaths, bloody injuries, threats, physical assaults, and unsettling depictions of experimental medical procedures.

Very strong language throughout, including more than 30+ uses of the F-word, repeated sexual and anatomical references, mild obscenities, frequent insulting and derogatory name-calling, and aggressive verbal outbursts.

872585.Title: Oppenheimer
872585.Summary: Aged 15+ for moderate violence, explicit sex and  nudity, and moderate language.

scenes.description: Lengthy explicit sexual content featuring a topless woman, strong intimate activity, and repeated sexual positioning.
Lengthy nudity following sexual activity featuring a fully nude woman and male character.
Explicit sexual content featuring female nudity and vigorous intimate activity during a chair sequence.
Approximately 8–9 uses of strong sexual expletives (F-words) and infrequent moderate profanity used in dialogue.
Contains graphic historical images of charred human remains and radiation victims. Includes a suicide by drug overdose and intense sequences of psychological peril.

937287.Title: Challengers
937287.Summary: Aged 16+ for mild violence, nudity and minor sexual content, and strong language throughout.

scenes.description: Mild to moderate sports-related violence includes an on-court knee injury with a visible snap and later brace use, along with brief physical altercations such as slapping, pushing, and a groin hit. The film also contains frequent heated arguments, aggressive behavior during tennis matches, and moments of emotional distress, but no serious or graphic violence beyond the injury scene.

Strong language throughout, including over 50 uses of the F-word and its derivatives, along with occasional sexual references, mild obscenities, and name-calling. The dialogue also includes a few scatological terms and an isolated obscene gesture, plus frequent heated exchanges and exclamations.

1064213.Title: Anora
1064213.Summary: Aged 18+ for mild violence, explicit sex and heavy nudity, and strong language throughout.

scenes.description: Mild to moderate violence includes biting, punching, and several physical confrontations involving pushing, grabbing, and restraint. Some characters sustain minor injuries such as bruises, scars, and a black eye, and one woman is briefly restrained and tied up.

Very strong language throughout, including extremely frequent use of the F-word (over 500 uses), repeated coarse profanity, sexualized insults, degrading slurs, and occasional highly offensive language.

1072790.Title: Anyone But You
1072790.Summary: Aged 16+ for explicit sex and brief nudity, and strong language throughout.

scenes.description: The film contains no actual violence, with only mild comedic physical incidents and brief non-serious confrontations.
